name: clawtool
description: Canonical tool layer + multi-agent supervisor for AI coding agents. Replaces native Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob with timeout-safe, structured-output, format-aware equivalents; dispatches to Claude Code / Codex / Opencode / Gemini via async BIAM (bidirectional inter-agent messaging) with edge-triggered TaskNotify fan-in; aggregates configurable MCP source servers; bundles sandbox profiles (bwrap / sandbox-exec / docker), saved web-UI portals, an MCP scaffolder, and a search-first ToolSearch for deferred tool discovery. Ships as a Claude Code marketplace plugin — install once, use everywhere.
